channel.title: Google Devices — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Google Devices (google_devices).

item.title: CVE-2026-0165
item.description: In several functions of the RTCP packet decoder, there is a possible out-of-bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exp…

item.title: CVE-2026-0164 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0162 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In ParsePayloads of AudioSdpParser.cpp, there is a possible memory corruption due to type confusion. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0161 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In numberOfReportBlocks of RtpSession.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploi…

item.title: CVE-2026-0160 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In TextRtpPayloadDecoderNode::DecodeT140 of TextRtpPayloadDecoderNode.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interactio…

item.title: CVE-2026-0158
item.description: In Camera, there is a possible unauthorized way to access photos due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0157
item.description: In RtcpHeader::decodeRtcpHeader, there is a possible OOB read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0156
item.description: In checkSsrcCollisionOnRcv of RtpSession.cpp, there is a possible memory safety issue due to a missing null check. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploita…

item.title: CVE-2026-0155
item.description: In ImsMediaBitReader::ReadByteBuffer, there is a possible OOB read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0154 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible way to trigger a modem crash during a SIP REFER request due to memory corruption. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0153 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In Write of msg_to_host_buffer.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitat…

item.title: CVE-2026-0152 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In OSMMapPMRGeneric of pmr_os.c, there is a possible way to leverage a system call to system call to maliciously expand the VMA out of bounds due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execut…

item.title: CVE-2026-0151 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In IntfGraphCreate of intfgraph.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0150 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In ExecuteGraph command handler of EdgeTPU firmware, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with root privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0149 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In RtpSession::rtpSendRtcpPacket, there is a possible OOB write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0148 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In multiple functions of VideoRtpPayloadDecoderNode.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for e…

item.title: CVE-2026-0147 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In __mfc_core_nal_q_get_dec_metadata_sei_nal of mfc_core_nal_q.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not…

item.title: CVE-2026-0146 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In mfc_core_get_dec_metadata_sei_nal of mfc_core_reg_api.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed…

item.title: CVE-2026-0145
item.description: In keymint, there is a possible Permission Bypass due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0144
item.description: In writeAocCommand of AocAudioCodec.cpp, there is a possible memory safety issue due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitatio…

item.title: CVE-2026-0143 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In lwis_device_external_event_emit of lwis_event.c, there is a possible memory corruption due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitati…

item.title: CVE-2026-0142 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: In iavb_parse_key_data of avb_rsa.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to improper input validation. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitat…

item.title: CVE-2026-0141
item.description: In decodeAppPacket of RtcpAppPacket.cpp, there is a possible OOB read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0140
item.description: In RtpPacket::decodePacket, there is a possible out-of-bounds read due to an integer overflow. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0139 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0138 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In lwis_io_buffer_write of lwis_io_buffer.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to memory corruption. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0137 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In edgetpu_sync_fence_group_shutdown() of edgetpu-dmabuf.c, there is a possible elevation of privilege due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed f…

item.title: CVE-2026-0136 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0135 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0134 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: In PostWipeData of recovery_ui.cpp, there is a possible data persistence issue after a factory reset due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is…

item.title: CVE-2026-0133 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In smmu_attach_dev of arm-smmu-v3.c, there is a possible way to sign malicious Android Runtime bootclass artifacts due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. Use…

item.title: CVE-2026-0132 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0131 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: In RtpPacket::decodePacket, there is a possible out of bounds access due to an integer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0130 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: In RtcpChunk::decodeRtcpChunk, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0129 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: In RtcpByePacket::decodeByePacket, there is a possible due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0128
item.description: In RtcpFbPacket::decodeRtcpFbPacket, there is a possible out of bounds read due to an integer overflow. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0127
item.description: In NrmmMsgCodec::DecodeUPUTransparentContext of cn_NrmmDecoder.cpp, there is a possible out-of-bounds read due to memory corruption. This could lead to remote denial of service causing a communication processor crash with no additional execution priv…

item.title: CVE-2026-0126
item.description: In WC-Radio, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0125 · 7 HIGH
item.description: In multiple functions of vpu_ioctl.c, there is a possible use after free due to a race condition. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0124 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: There is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0123 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In EfwApTransport::ProcessRxRing of efw_ap_transport.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not n…

item.title: CVE-2026-0122 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In multiple places, there is a possible out of bounds write due to memory corruption. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0121 · 2.9 LOW
item.description: In VPU, there is a possible use-after-free read due to a race condition. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0120 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In modem, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0119 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: In usim_SendMCCMNCIndMsg of usim_Registration.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to memory corruption. This could lead to physical escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for…

item.title: CVE-2026-0118 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In oobconfig, there is a possible bypass of carrier restrictions due to a logic error. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0117 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In mfc_dec_dqbuf of mfc_dec_v4l2.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploita…

item.title: CVE-2026-0116 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In __mfc_handle_released_buf of mfc_core_isr.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploit…

item.title: CVE-2026-0115 · 2.1 LOW
item.description: In Trusted Execution Environment, there is a possible key leak due to side channel information disclosure. This could lead to physical information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

item.title: CVE-2026-0114 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In Modem, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.
